/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/NekoECATConverter.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/NekoECATConverter.dir/NekoECATConverter_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NekoECATConverter.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NekoECATConverter.dir/src/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NekoECATConverter.dir/src/worker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NekoECATConverter.dir/src/core/theme.cpp.o -o NekoECATConverter  /usr/lib/libQt5Widgets.so.5.15.19 /usr/lib/libQt5Gui.so.5.15.19 /usr/lib/libQt5Core.so.5.15.19
